items.raw_desc: Switch D-Link DGS-1530-28:A network switch is an active network component that connects individual devices or other network elements. It is suitable for controlling network traffic. The D-Link DGS-1530-28 is supposed to be installed in a rack. This model features a switching capacity of 128 Gb/s. The Switch is equipped with 24 × RJ-45 ports that provide connection with network elements. 10/100/1000Base-T technology facilitates data transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. The switch dimensions are 440 × 140 × 44mm. The weight of the switch is 2150g. The D-Link DGS-1530-28 likewise works on the ISO/OSI model network layer,  meaning it can double as a router. Thanks to this neat feature, you won't have to buy any extra network element. Key Features of the D-Link DGS-1530-28 Switch For connecting end devices and other nodes 128 Gb/s switching capacity Equipped with 24 × RJ-45 ports D-Link switch is designed for rack installation VLAN support Supports L3 layer, allowing it to work as standalone router
